CustomField.description: Date of the prior NEPA document that this process tiers from or supplements. Used by VR-006 to check whether the prior EIS is older than 5 years (1,825 days), requiring a documented supplementation review per 40 CFR 1502.9(c).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date of the prior NEPA document being tiered from. If more than 5 years old, a supplementation review determination is required.
CustomField.label: Prior NEPA Document Date
